data.title: Warning: XRP Price Is Forming A Death Cross That Previously Led To A 15% Crash
data.description:
The XRP price is currently at risk of a crash as crypto analyst Umair has revealed that the altcoin has formed a death cross. Notably, this same pattern formed the last time that XRP suffered a 15% crash. XRP Price At Risk With Death Cross Forming In an X post, Umair stated that a death cross was forming on the daily chart for the XRP price. He further noted that the last time the altcoin printed this setup, it crashed by 15%, which, the analyst said, lines up perfectly with a potential decline to the $1
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-is-forming-a-death-cross/

data.title: South Korea's Top Crypto Exchange to Be Absorbed By Tech Giant in $10.3 Billion Deal
data.description:

data.title: UK to expand bill issuance to appeal to stablecoin issuers, diversify investor base
data.description:
The UK government is reportedly considering expanding the Treasury bill issuance as a way to broaden the investor base for its short-term debt while bolstering the sterling currency markets. The plan is to go through its Debt Management Office (DMO) and is taking the steps amid escalating demand from new buyers like stablecoin issuers, who […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/uk-bill-issuance-appeal-stablecoin-issuers/

data.description:

data.title: U.S. Lawmakers Unveil Bipartisan Crackdown on Explosive Growth of AI-Powered Fraud
data.description:
U. S. lawmakers propose the AI Fraud Deterrence Act to tackle the rising wave of AI‑powered scams, boosting penalties for deepfake, phishing and crypto fraud.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bipartisan-ai-fraud-crackdown-bill/

data.title: S&P Slashes Tether’s USDT Stability Rating to “Weak” Amid Transparency Concerns
data.description:
S&P Global Ratings has downgraded Tether’s USDT to its lowest stability tier, warning that the world’s largest stablecoin is now more vulnerable to market shocks than previously understood.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/sp-slashes-tethers-usdt-stability-rating-to-weak-amid-transparency-concerns/

data.title: Vitalik Buterin: Ethereum’s Growth Will Be “Less Uniform” as Gas Costs Face Targeted Adjustments
data.description:
Just a year after developers — led in part by Vitalik Buterin’s push for scaling — began advocating for higher gas limits, Ethereum is now operating with a 60 million block gas limit, doubling network capacity in only 12 months.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/vitalik-buterin-ethereums-growth-will-be-less-uniform-as-gas-costs-face-targeted-adjustments/
